history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed user interface shows a “LEVEL UP!” screen with a circular avatar and several level progress statistics.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a centered panel labeled “pru y” with a large “LEVEL 10” tile, an “EXPERIENCE 11 / 550” tile, a horizontal progress bar, and three smaller stat boxes reading “MESSAGES 829,” “XP NEEDED 539,” and “NEXT LVL 11,” alongside a round profile image on the left.

Setting:
The scene is entirely digital, resembling a game or app progress dashboard on a dark background with a subtle purple and blue gradient; the “LEVEL UP!” header is at the top.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in gold with decorative small diamond shapes on either side. The central rounded rectangle panel is dark with a faint border. On the left inside the panel, there is a circular avatar showing a stylized anime-like illustration with multiple small UI-like elements around it. To the right of the avatar, the name “pru y” appears in white. A purple rounded rectangle contains “LEVEL 10” in white. Next to it, a green rounded rectangle contains “EXPERIENCE 11 / 550” in white. Beneath these is a long horizontal progress bar that is mostly dark with a small highlighted section on the left, and a “2%” label on the right. Below, three smaller rounded boxes display “MESSAGES 829,” “XP NEEDED 539,” and “NEXT LVL 11.” Very faint text appears near the bottom center of the panel but is unclear.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
pru y
LEVEL PROGRESS
#20
LEVEL
10
EXPERIENCE
11 / 550
2%
MESSAGES
829
XP NEEDED
539
NEXT LVL
11

Practical Summary:
The image displays a game-like “level up” progress screen with a level and experience bar. It shows current level 10 and progress toward the next level, with counts for messages and remaining XP.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
